description: Configure two independent Docker Compose projects, 'shared-infra' (PostgreSQL + Redis) and 'flask-api', to communicate via external networks named 'infra-db-net' and 'infra-cache-net'. Currently, these projects are on isolated default networks and cannot communicate. Modify the configuration files at /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/shared-infra/docker-compose.yml and /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/flask-api/docker-compose.yml to attach the Postgres service to 'infra-db-net', the Redis service to 'infra-cache-net', and the API service to both external networks. After starting the services, verify connectivity via the Flask app's health checks (http://localhost:5050/health/db and /health/redis) and save a report confirming the network setup and connection status to /home/ga/Documents/docker-projects/connectivity-report.txt.
